audit_status.source_base: Greek James text tradition, draft aligned to public-domain comparison layer later
audit_status.review_note: Compact draft reviewed for rich oppressors, laborers' wages, patience, oaths, prayer, anointing, restoration.

verses.restored: Come now, rich ones, weep, howling over your hardships coming upon you.
Your wealth has rotted, and your garments have become moth-eaten.
Your gold and silver have corroded, and their corrosion will be witness against you and will eat your flesh like fire. You stored treasure in last days.
Look, the wage of the workers who harvested your fields, withheld by you, cries out, and the cries of the harvesters have entered the ears of Lord of hosts.
You lived luxuriously upon the earth and indulged yourselves; you nourished your hearts in a day of slaughter.
You condemned, you murdered the righteous/just one; he does not resist you.
Therefore be patient, siblings, until the presence/arrival of the Lord. Look, the farmer waits for the precious fruit of the earth, being patient over it until it receives early and late rain.
You also be patient; establish your hearts, because the presence/arrival of the Lord has drawn near.
Do not groan against one another, siblings, so that you may not be judged. Look, the Judge stands before the doors.
Take, siblings, the prophets who spoke in the name of the Lord as example of suffering and patience.
Look, we call blessed those who endured. You heard of the endurance of Job and saw the Lord's end, that the Lord is deeply compassionate and merciful.
But above all, my siblings, do not swear, neither by heaven nor by earth nor by any other oath; but let your yes be yes and your no be no, so that you may not fall under judgment.
Is anyone among you suffering? Let one pray. Is anyone cheerful? Let one sing praise.
Is anyone among you weak/sick? Let one call the elders of the assembly, and let them pray over one, anointing with oil in the name of the Lord.
And the prayer of trust will save/heal the weary one, and the Lord will raise one up; and if one has committed sins/misalignments, it will be released/forgiven.
Therefore confess misalignments to one another and pray for one another, so that you may be healed. The active prayer of a righteous/just one is very strong.
Elijah was a human of like-feeling with us, and he prayed with prayer that it not rain, and it did not rain upon the earth three years and six months.
And he prayed again, and the heaven gave rain, and the earth produced its fruit.
My siblings, if anyone among you is led astray from the truth and someone turns that one back,
let that one know that the one turning back a sinner/misaligned one from wandering way will save/heal that one's soul/life from death and cover a multitude of sins/misalignments.

translation_notes: James 5 targets exploitative wealth, specifically withheld wages and luxury built on harm.
Healing language is prayerful and communal without promising mechanical outcomes.
Job is referenced through endurance and the Lord's compassion/mercy, aligning with the earlier completed Job framework.
